title: Business Development Manager
description: Drive client acquisition and partnership development across Southeast Asia. You will identify new business opportunities, manage the full sales cycle from outreach to close, and build long-term relationships with enterprise clients in the MarTech and digital marketing space.
requirements: 3+ years of BD, sales or account management experience
Strong knowledge of digital marketing, MarTech, or SaaS
Experience working with regional SEA markets preferred
Self-starter who thrives in a fast-paced environment

title: MarTech Implementation Consultant
description: Lead technical implementation of MarTech platforms for enterprise clients across Southeast Asia. You will work hands-on with CDPs, CRMs, marketing automation tools, and analytics platforms — configuring integrations, managing onboarding, and advising clients on best-in-class architecture.
requirements: Experience implementing CDP, CRM or Marketing Automation platforms
Familiarity with tools like Mixpanel, mParticle, Netcore, OneSignal, or AB Tasty
Technical aptitude — comfortable with APIs, data pipelines, and event tracking
